full_text:
Guo Dian (Junye)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Dian, styledJunye, was born in Zuopingyi. Aided Huangfu Song in destroying Zhang Bao’s army. Guo Dian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
